summary: Full testing of Aesthetics Boutique website - both backend APIs and frontend UI. All core features working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Form has HTML5 'required' attributes triggering native browser validation instead of the JS error handler. The `data-testid='form-error'` div does NOT appear when clicking submit with all empty fields because browser stops submission before JS runs. This is acceptable UX but test note for future agents.

critical_code_review_comments: Form validation: JS-level validation (name/phone/service required check) only fires if browser doesn't block first via HTML required attr. If user fills name and phone but not service, JS validation shows error correctly. Minor UX inconsistency.
seed_data_creation: Created 3 TEST_ enquiry entries via API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 backend tests pass. Frontend fully working: homepage, trust banner, 4 service cards, gallery filters (7 tabs), bridal CTA, 8 reviews, contact form with success state, WhatsApp float button, mobile menu toggle, footer with correct info. The only minor note is form uses HTML5 required which prevents JS validation from showing on fully empty submit - JS validation does fire for partial empty (e.g. missing service only).
